title: season — declared entitlements
description: Five entitlement keys. `sports_seasons` is the boolean master gate for the whole module (OFF on Small tier per hierarchy.md §7). `season_slot` caps seasons per year (Medium=4, Enterprise=null). `season_playoffs` gates the has_playoffs=true code path (Medium+). `season_late_registration` gates the allows_late_registration+fee combo (Medium+). `season_sport_scoping` gates the sport_key column (Enterprise-only — multi-sport tenants that run different seasons per sport).

entitlements.description: Master feature gate. Off = the whole module is invisible: no season CRUD, no routes reachable, no `season.enforce_registration_open` middleware fires (because enrollments are always-on), the seed listener no-ops. Small tier is locked out entirely per hierarchy.md §7 — Small tenants run 'always-on' scheduling without seasonal boundaries. When a Medium+ tenant downgrades to Small, existing Season rows survive (the entitlement reconciler surfaces the drift) but new writes refuse.
enforcedBy: SeasonObserver.creating refuses when the gate is closed (SEASON_FEATURE_NOT_ENTITLED, 402)
SDUI resource surfaces hidden when features array does not include 'sports_seasons.core'
SeedDefaultSeasonForTenantJob checks the gate before dispatching the create

entitlements.description: How many Seasons a tenant can have IN ONE CALENDAR YEAR that the season overlaps. Small: 0 (feature off; slot is 0 for compliance with the master gate). Medium: 4 (covers a quarterly / trimester cadence with a spare + a summer camp). Enterprise: unlimited (null cap). Consumed on Season create; the accounting window is any calendar year that the season overlaps (a season crossing Dec-Feb counts against both years). Slot resets on Jan 1 UTC per year. Non-current + non-active-window seasons still count — an archived season keeps its slot occupied per financial retention.
enforcedBy: SeasonObserver.creating consumes 1 unit via EntitlementGate::consume('season_slot', { calendar_years: overlapping })
SeasonObserver.deleted (hard-delete only — post-retention) releases the slot; soft-delete keeps it

SeasonProvisioner sets is_system_provisioned=true on the tenant-default seed path so it does NOT consume a slot (matches the region default-region pattern — system-provisioned invariants don't consume tenant slots)

entitlements.description: Enables `has_playoffs=true` + the `playoff_starts_at` / `playoff_ends_at` columns + the `playoffs` state in the lifecycle machine. Enterprise-only because the multi-phase competition flow is a higher-tier feature. Medium tenants that want a playoff can approximate by creating a second Season for the playoff period.
enforcedBy: SeasonObserver.creating refuses when has_playoffs=true and gate is closed (SEASON_PLAYOFFS_NOT_ENTITLED, 402)
SDUI create + edit screens hide the playoff fields when features array does not include 'sports_seasons.playoffs'

entitlements.description: Enables `allows_late_registration=true` + the `late_registration_ends_at` column + the `late_registration_fee_cents` surcharge column. Medium + Enterprise. Small tenants have no season feature so this doesn't apply. The finance module (Wave 4) will consume the fee amount when generating enrollment invoices in the late window.
enforcedBy: SeasonObserver.creating refuses when allows_late_registration=true and gate is closed (SEASON_LATE_REGISTRATION_NOT_ENTITLED, 402)
SDUI create + edit screens hide the late-registration fields when features array does not include 'sports_seasons.late_registration'

entitlements.description: Enables the `sport_key` column — the multi-sport tenant flow where different seasons run for different sports (football Sep-Jun, basketball Nov-Apr, swimming perpetual). Enterprise-only. Off = every Season is sport-agnostic within its (tenant, org, branch) tuple; the observer refuses non-null sport_key writes.
enforcedBy: SeasonObserver.creating refuses when sport_key IS NOT NULL and gate is closed (SEASON_SPORT_SCOPING_NOT_ENTITLED, 402)
SeasonObserver.saving refuses sport_key changes when the gate is closed
SDUI create + edit screens hide the sport_key picker when features array does not include 'sports_seasons.sport_scoping'
